summary: Pending schedule stats in AIPS_Templates still mix current_time(), strtotime(), and date() instead of using AIPS_DateTime consistently.
why_it_matters: This service calculates user-facing schedule windows, so ad-hoc timestamp math risks timezone drift and duplicates logic already centralized in AIPS_DateTime and the interval calculator.
suggested_fix: Normalize schedule-window and next-run calculations through AIPS_DateTime value objects or a dedicated helper so the service only coordinates stats counting.
